narrative:
Union Township T (precinct in Clermont County) has 1,126 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.6 percentage points.
